title: Unwanted data overwrite in Xano from Weweb workflow
symptom: When updating user profile information in Xano via a Weweb workflow, some fields are unintentionally emptied.
applies_when: Using Weweb to update Xano user profile
Fields are partially filled in the form
not_this_if: All fields in the form are filled
No fields in Xano are empty
root_cause: The Xano API may overwrite fields with empty values if they are not explicitly set to retain their original values. This can happen when the API call does not include a filter to prevent empty fields from being sent.
fix_steps: Set up a filter in the Xano API call called 'first_notempty'
Ensure that the filter is applied to all fields that should retain their original values
agent_instruction: Configure the Xano API call to include the 'first_notempty' filter to prevent unwanted data overwrites.
